overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player exiting a vehicle in a neon-lit urban alley, entering a mechanic's workshop, and traversing the industrial interior toward a commercial street exit. The scene features detailed cyberpunk aesthetics with mixed natural and artificial lighting.

events.description: player opens vehicle door and steps out into the alleyway

agents.ego_description: sitting in the driver's seat of a delivery truck, then opening the door to exit

black steering wheel with metallic accents
front windshield showing street view with neon signs
colorful neon signage on buildings visible through windshield

segments.scene_description: The clip begins inside a vehicle cabin with a view of a cyberpunk street through the windshield. The player character sits in the driver's seat before opening the door to exit into the alleyway.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with industrial equipment and corrugated walls

events.description: approaching and entering the garage workshop through the open roll-up door

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow alley past a yellow utility cabinet toward the garage entrance

rusted corrugated metal fencing along the alley wall
large industrial roll-up door partially open revealing dark interior

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a narrow concrete alley flanked by corrugated metal walls and a prominent yellow electrical cabinet. A mechanic stands near the open garage door ahead as the camera approaches the workshop entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial workshop with metal shelving and workbenches

events.description: camera approaches large muscular character working at central workbench

agents.ego_description: entering the dimly lit workshop and approaching a large mechanic working at a metal bench

notable_agents.action: large muscular character with red mohawk and yellow boots working on items at the workbench

entered.detail: tall metal storage racks filled with boxes and equipment
large metal workbench with tools and components scattered on surface
long fluorescent light fixtures hanging from ceiling
metal cabinets and storage units along the right wall

segments.scene_description: Inside the industrial workshop, the camera moves past metal shelving units toward a central workbench where a large muscular character with a red mohawk is working. The space is lit by overhead fluorescent lights with tools and equipment organized on racks.

scene_state.functional_zone: cluttered workshop interior with workbenches and storage areas

events.description: camera circles around workbench to examine items from different angle

agents.ego_description: moving past the mechanic and closely examining the workbench area with various tools and items

notable_agents.action: mechanic continues working at bench as camera passes by on the right side

entered.detail: bright purple vending machine with illuminated display
articulated industrial desk lamp over the workbench
green glass bottle sitting on the workbench surface

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the working mechanic to explore the workbench area, revealing a purple vending machine against the back wall and various tools on the metal surfaces. The player examines items on the bench including a green glass bottle before moving deeper into the workshop.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional workshop area with skylights leading to commercial street exit

events.description: natural sunlight from overhead skylights becomes visible as camera moves into open area
approaching open exit with view of commercial street and pedestrians beyond

agents.ego_description: walking through the open workshop area toward the back exit with shops and pedestrians visible beyond

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking toward camera in the distance near the street exit

entered.detail: glass skylight panels in the ceiling allowing natural light to enter
scattered cardboard pieces and trash on the concrete floor
shop fronts and displays visible through the exit opening

segments.scene_description: Moving through a more open area of the workshop with skylights overhead, the camera approaches an exit leading to a commercial street. Natural light mixes with the artificial lighting, and pedestrians become visible in the distance as the player heads toward the street exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the enclosed cabin of a vehicle through a gritty industrial workshop and out into a bright commercial street. It begins inside the driver's seat looking through the windshield before the camera exits the vehicle into a narrow concrete alley flanked by corrugated metal walls and a yellow electrical cabinet. As the camera approaches and enters the open garage door, the scene shifts into a dimly lit industrial interior filled with metal shelving and fluorescent lights, moving toward a muscular mechanic with a red mohawk at a central workbench. The perspective then lingers on the workbench area, passing a purple vending machine and a green glass bottle, before gliding deeper into the facility. Finally, the environment opens up under overhead skylights where natural light blends with the artificial glow, leading the camera toward an exit where pedestrians are visible on the distant street.
